# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

_format_version: "1.0"
kong:
  port: 8001
  proxy_listen: 8002
  admin_listen: 8003
database:
  client_certificate: "/etc/ssl/my-client.pem"
  ssl_verify: true
  redis:
    host: "production-redis.internal.example.com"
    port: 6379
  postgres:
    host: "production-postgres.internal.example.com"
    port: 5432
    user: "kong_user"
    password: "supersecurepassword"
    database: "kong"
